name: e-Arşiv (TR) e-Invoicing
description: Turkey e-Arşiv Fatura (B2C) / e-Fatura (B2B) adapter, contributed into invoice:adapter — sandboxed. Builds real UBL-TR 2.1 (TR1.2) documents from the host-serialised rows (unsigned — the legal seal is the separate host-side SMS-OTP finalisation) and submits via a tenant-configured GİB-approved integrator (Foriba / Logo). With no integrator configured it behaves like the built-in mock: synthetic accepted result + generated UBL-TR in raw.

settings.label: e-Arşiv Integrator
settings.help: Which GİB-approved integrator to use: 'mock' (default — synthetic success + generated UBL-TR, no egress), 'foriba', or 'logo'. Other values fall back to mock.

settings.label: Integrator Base URL
settings.help: The integrator's web-service endpoint (Foriba / Logo provide separate TEST and PROD URLs per customer). Required for real integrators; ignored by mock.

settings.label: Use Integrator Sandbox
settings.help: 'true' (default) selects the integrator's TEST endpoint, 'false' selects PROD. Only relevant when a base URL is not pinned.

settings.label: Integrator Username
settings.help: SOAP/REST username (or TCKN/VKN portal login) issued by the integrator. Not a secret — kept as a setting to match the original adapter.

secrets.label: Integrator Password
secrets.help: The integrator API password / portal password; injected host-side into the request, never seen by the plugin.
